title: neolitsea buisanensis f. sutsuoensis
intro: Neolitsea buisanensis f. sutsuoensis is a plant species within the Neolitsea genus, which is a type of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Neolitsea buisanensis f. sutsuoensis has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including decoctions and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
